name: Scorer Validation Relevance review for ssr-scoring-validation-use bundle
summary: Accepted. Frohn et al. and Walsh et al. provide direct scorer-validation, calibration, benchmarking, or stress-test relevance. Yoo et al. and Wolfe et al. are correctly framed as boundary or adjacent augmentation evidence rather than direct synthetic validation evidence.

findings.claim_or_issue: Two included sources are adjacent augmentation or training-boundary evidence, not direct validation-set evidence.
findings.why_it_matters: The review question is scorer-validation use, so adjacent evidence must not be counted as direct proof.
findings.recommended_action: Keep Yoo et al. and Wolfe et al. in boundary-condition support roles unless later evidence shows direct scorer-validation use.
